creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
FYI, 3.16.1 has just been released.
I wouldn't bother with that patch release, because the only change is a fix for building c++ stublibs on ocaml 5.3alpha. As we are far from shipping ocaml5.3, let alone having port buiding c++ stublibs with dune...
On the other hand, if  any interest is suddently expressed, I can refresh the patch (likely trivial).
Please also bump all depending ports when committing.
